Our story

Built by people who hated invoice chaos.

Finexa started as an internal tool for a small agency that was drowning in spreadsheets, follow-up emails, and late payments. We turned that pain into a product that works for every team that invoices for a living.

Mission

Make billing invisible for every Indian business.

We believe billing should take minutes, not hours. That collections should be predictable, not stressful. And that every business — from solo freelancers to 50-person agencies — deserves professional-grade invoicing without enterprise complexity.

1,400+

Businesses using Finexa

Rs 42Cr+

Invoices processed

3.2 days

Avg. collection time

48 hrs/mo

Admin time saved per team

What we stand for

The values that shape the product.

Reliability first

Billing workflows fail businesses at the worst moments. We build for accuracy and consistency at every layer.

Clarity over complexity

Every screen in Finexa is designed to show the information that matters, with zero visual noise.

Built for India

GST, INR, Indian business workflows — Finexa is designed from the ground up for how India does billing.

Automate the boring parts

Reminders, recurring invoices, status updates — Finexa handles the repetition so your team doesn't have to.

Team

The people behind Finexa.

P

Priya Nair

Co-founder & CEO

Former fintech lead with 8 years building billing infrastructure for scale-ups across India.

Co-founder & CTO

Finexa

AI-powered invoicing and billing for modern businesses.
